# unfirehose — LLM & Agent API Reference

> Base URL: http://localhost:3000 (self-hosted)
> All endpoints return JSON. Errors: `{ error, detail?, status? }`
> No authentication required for local instance.

## Logs & Thinking Traces

### GET /api/logs
Search all conversation logs across harnesses (Claude Code, Fetch, uncloseai).
- `?search=error` — full-text search
- `?project=-home-fox-git-myapp` — filter by project
- `?types=assistant,user,thinking` — filter message types
- `?from=2026-03-01&to=2026-03-07` — date range
- `?session=abc123` — single session
- `?limit=50&offset=0` — pagination
→ `{ entries: [{ id, sessionId, project, type, timestamp, content, model }], total, limit, offset }`

### GET /api/thinking
Search thinking/reasoning blocks from all sessions.
- `?search=architecture` — search thinking content
- `?project=...&from=...&to=...&limit=100&offset=0`
→ `{ entries: [{ sessionId, project, timestamp, thinking, model }], total, limit, offset }`

### GET /api/sessions/{sessionId}
Full conversation replay for a session.
- `?project=-home-fox-git-myapp` — project context
- `?types=user,assistant` — filter types
- `?offset=0&limit=200` — paginate messages
- `?stream=true` — SSE stream instead of JSON
→ `{ entries: [...], count, offset, limit }`

### GET /api/sessions/{sessionId}/thinking
All thinking blocks from a specific session.
- `?project=...`
→ `[{ sessionId, project, timestamp, thinking, precedingPrompt, model }]`


## Todo System

### GET /api/todos
All todos with filters.
- `?project=...&status=pending&source=claude`
→ `{ todos: [...], byProject: {...}, counts: {...} }`

### POST /api/todos
Create a todo.
← `{ content: "Fix the thing", source: "manual", projectId?: "...", projectName?: "..." }`
→ `{ ok: true, id: 123 }`

### PATCH /api/todos
Update a single todo.
← `{ id: 123, status?: "completed", estimatedMinutes?: 30 }`
→ `{ ok: true }`

### GET /api/todos/pending
Actionable pending todos with smart filters.
- `?project=-home-fox-git-myapp` — by project
- `?search=auth` — search content
- `?quick=true` — under 15 minutes only
- `?needs_ticket=true` — items needing tickets
- `?limit=20`
→ `[{ id, uuid, content, status, source, project, estimatedMinutes, createdAt, updatedAt }]`

### GET /api/todos/summary
Landscape overview — counts, stale items, by-project breakdown.
→ `{ counts: { pending, completed, ... }, totalMinutes, needsTicket, staleCount, byProject: {...}, bySource: {...}, oldestPending: {...} }`

### GET /api/todos/stale
Items not touched in N days.
- `?days=7&limit=20&project=...`
→ `{ staleThresholdDays, count, todos: [...] }`

### PATCH /api/todos/bulk
Bulk update multiple todos.
← `{ ids: [1,2,3], status: "completed" }`
→ `{ ok: true, updated: 3 }`

### GET /api/todos/graph
Graphviz visualization of todo relationships.
- `?project=...&status=pending&layout=dot`
→ `{ svg, nodeCount, edgeCount, dot }`


## Projects

### GET /api/projects
List all projects with metadata.
→ `[{ name, displayName, path, sessionCount, totalMessages, latestActivity, hasMemory }]`

### GET /api/projects/activity
Activity metrics across projects.
- `?days=30` — lookback period
- `?project=...` — single project with git context
→ `[{ name, user_messages, assistant_messages, thinking_blocks, ... }]`

### GET /api/projects/{project}/sessions
All sessions for a project.
- `?sort=latest&order=desc`
→ `{ project, originalPath, sessions: [...] }`

### GET /api/projects/{project}/git
Git status for a project repo.
→ `{ repoPath, branch, files: [...], diff, isDirty }`

### POST /api/projects/{project}/git
Commit changes in a project repo.
← `{ message: "Fix auth bug", addAll: true }`
→ `{ success: true, commit: "abc123", pushed: true }`

### POST /api/projects/{project}/git/suggest
Generate a commit message using LLM.
- Header: `x-vault-api-key: sk-...` (optional, decrypted BYOK key)
→ `{ message: "Fix login redirect on expired sessions", provider: "claude-max" }`
Provider fallback: vault BYOK → Claude Max OAuth → Qwen 3 Coder mesh → Hermes 3 mesh


## Dashboard & Analytics

### GET /api/dashboard
Aggregate dashboard metrics.
- `?range=7d` — 1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 14d, 28d
→ `{ range, summary, modelBreakdown, dailyActivity, hourCounts, dayOfWeekCounts, dowHourHeatmap }`

### GET /api/tokens
Token usage analytics.
- `?range=7d`
→ `{ range, summary, modelBreakdown, dailyActivity, toolCalls, blockTypes }`

### GET /api/usage
Usage timeline or by-project breakdown.
- `?minutes=60` — time window
- `?view=projects` — group by project
→ Timeline array or project breakdown

### GET /api/stats
Cached statistics.
- `?from=2026-03-01&to=2026-03-07`
→ Aggregate stats object

### GET /api/active-sessions
Currently active sessions.
- `?minutes=15` — activity window
→ `{ sessions: [...], count }`

### GET /api/live
Server-sent events stream of live session activity.
→ SSE: `{ type, sessions?, entry?, ... }`


## Mesh / Permacomputer

### GET /api/mesh
All mesh node stats (SSH-connected machines).
→ `{ nodes: [...], localHostname, summary }`

### GET /api/mesh/history
Time-series metrics for mesh nodes.
- `?hours=24&hostname=cammy`
→ `{ timeline: [{ timestamp, cpuPercent, memUsedGB, memTotalGB, gpuUtil, gpuMemUsedGB, ... }], hostnames, hours, count }`

### POST /api/mesh/history
Ingest snapshot from mesh nodes.
← `{ nodes: [...] }`

### GET /api/mesh/node
Deep probe of a single node.
- `?host=cammy`
→ CPU, memory, GPU, temps, processes, network, Docker, tmux, screen sessions

### GET /api/mesh/geoip
GeoIP lookup for mesh nodes.

### GET /api/mesh/rates
Currency exchange rates for cost calculations.

### GET /api/unsandbox
unsandbox.com cloud platform integration.
- `?action=status` — tier, diagnostics, rate limits


## Graph Explorer

### GET /api/graph
Graphviz visualizations of sessions, tools, projects, timelines.
- `?view=sessions|tools|projects|timeline`
- `?project=...&layout=dot|neato|fdp&format=svg`
→ `{ svg, nodeCount, edgeCount, dot }`


## Scrobble (Social Feed)

### GET /api/scrobble/payload
Full scrobble payload for publishing to the network.
→ `{ $schema, generatedAt, handle, lifetime, streaks, badges, activity, timeSeries, models, tools, projects }`

### GET /api/scrobble/preview
Preview of scrobble data before publishing.


## Schema & Documentation

### GET /api/schema
Browse database schema and source files.
- `?file=db/schema.ts` — read specific file
→ `{ files: [...] }` or `{ file, content }`


## Settings & Configuration

### GET /api/settings
All settings as key-value pairs.
→ `{ theme_accent_color, unfirehose_plan, ..., _system_username }`

### POST /api/settings
Set a setting.
← `{ action: "set", key: "theme_accent_color", value: "#d40000" }`

### GET /api/llm/providers
Discover available LLM providers (auto-detected + mesh).
→ `{ providers: [{ id, name, source, type, model, ready, detail }] }`


## Blog

### GET /api/blog
List blog posts.
- `?limit=10&offset=0`
→ Array of posts

### POST /api/blog
Create a blog post.
← `{ title, description, source, content, url }`
→ `{ ok: true, id }`


## Alerts

### GET /api/alerts
System alerts and notifications.
- `?filter=unread&limit=50&offset=0&paginate=true`
→ `{ alerts: [...], total }`

### POST /api/alerts
Manage alerts (dismiss, acknowledge).
← `{ action: "dismiss", id: 123 }`


## Triage

### GET /api/triage
Triage overview for a project.
- `?project=...&days=7&limit=20`

### POST /api/triage
Execute triage actions.
← `{ actions: [...] }`
→ `{ ok: true, results: [...] }`


## API Keys

### GET /api/keys
List API keys for programmatic access.
→ `{ keys: [...] }`

### POST /api/keys
Create an API key.
← `{ label: "my-agent", parentKeyId?, scopes: ["read"] }`
→ `{ ok: true, id, key: "unfh-...", keyPrefix }`

### DELETE /api/keys
Revoke an API key.
← `{ keyId: "..." }`

### GET /api/keys/usage
API key usage analytics.
- `?days=30`
→ `{ period, total, byKey: {...} }`


## Ingest

### GET /api/ingest
Ingest status and database info.
→ `{ ingested, db }`

### POST /api/ingest
Ingest JSONL conversation data.
← Raw JSONL lines
→ `{ accepted, errors }`


## Boot & Harness Management

### POST /api/boot
Boot a Claude Code session on a mesh node.
← `{ projectPath, sessionId?, yolo?, prompt?, host?, sudoPassword? }`
→ `{ success, tmuxSession, command }`

### POST /api/boot/finished
Mark a boot session as complete.

### POST /api/boot/mega
Mega-boot: batch bootstrap across multiple nodes.

### GET /api/tmux/stream
SSE stream of tmux terminal output.
- `?session=mysession&host=cammy&windows=true`

### POST /api/tmux/stream
Send keystrokes to tmux session.
← `{ session, keys: "ls -la", special?: "Enter" }`
→ `{ ok: true }`

### POST /api/harness/verify
Verify harness installation on a remote node.
← `{ host, install?: true, verify?: true }`
→ `{ success, version, steps }`


## Maintenance

### POST /api/pii-backfill
Scan and redact PII from stored conversation data.
→ `{ ok, blocksScanned, blocksModified, sessionsModified, piiReplacementsAdded }`

### GET /api/ssh-config
Parse and list SSH config hosts and keys.
→ `{ hosts: [...], keys: [...] }`

### POST /api/ssh-config
Add/update SSH config entry.
← `{ name, hostname, port?, user?, identityFile? }`

### GET /api/apmonitor
Application monitoring for mesh nodes.
- `?host=...&path=...`
→ `{ nodes: [...], summary }`


## Agent Workflow Examples

### Start-of-session orientation
```bash
curl -s localhost:3000/api/todos/summary | python3 -m json.tool
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/todos/pending?project=-home-fox-git-myapp&limit=10"
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/projects/activity?days=7"
```

### Search conversation history
```bash
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/logs?search=auth+error&types=assistant&from=2026-03-01&limit=50"
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/thinking?search=architecture&limit=100"
```

### Extract training data (thinking traces)
```bash
# All thinking blocks for a project
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/thinking?project=-home-fox-git-myapp&limit=1000"

# Full session replay with thinking
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/sessions/SESSION_ID?types=user,assistant,thinking"

# Scrobble payload — structured activity + model usage data
curl -s localhost:3000/api/scrobble/payload
```

### Todo management
```bash
# Create
curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/todos -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"content":"Fix auth","source":"manual"}'

# Bulk complete
curl -X PATCH localhost:3000/api/todos/bulk -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"ids":[1,2,3],"status":"completed"}'

# Quick wins
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/todos/pending?quick=true&limit=20"
```

### Git operations from agents
```bash
# Check repo status
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/projects/-home-fox-git-myapp/git"

# Generate commit message (uses LLM fallback chain)
curl -X POST "localhost:3000/api/projects/-home-fox-git-myapp/git/suggest"

# Commit and push
curl -X POST "localhost:3000/api/projects/-home-fox-git-myapp/git" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"message":"Fix auth redirect","addAll":true}'
```

### Infrastructure monitoring
```bash
# All mesh nodes
curl -s localhost:3000/api/mesh

# 24h time-series for a node
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/mesh/history?hours=24&hostname=cammy"

# Deep probe
curl -s "localhost:3000/api/mesh/node?host=cammy"
```
